test.name: Check Web page Title - Test 1

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

test.status:
Flowbite Starter != Тестовое задание
Also teardown failed: Known issue: Bug #5437

test.name: Check Order Title - Test 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Проверка заголовка "Правила порядка": название заголовка соотвествует Правила порядка

test.name: Check Empty Run Sorting - Test 3

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: Проверка "пустого" запуска (при нажатии "Сортировать" и незаполненных данных, приложение не крашится)

test.name: Check Empty Run Clear - Test 4

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: Проверка "пустого" запуска очистки (при нажатии "Очистить" и незаполненных данных, приложение не крашится)

test.name: Check Dropdown Options - Test 5

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get List Items
kw.doc: Returns all labels or values of selection list ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'select1' by value К.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Get Selected List Value
kw.doc: Returns the value of selected option from selection list ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'select1' by value З.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Get Selected List Value

test.doc: Проверка элементов выпадающих списков (все элементы выпадающих списков (select1, select2, select3) корректно отображаются и выбираются)

test.name: Check Color Buttons Options - Test 6

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: Проверка кнопок "К","С","З" (имена кнопок корректны и при их нажатии прописывается корректный элемент)

test.name: Check Sequence Options - Test 7

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is empty.

kw.name: Get Element Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the value of ``attribute`` from the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Проверка поля ввода последовательности (поле ввода пустое и недоступно для редактирования с клавиатуры)

test.name: Check Color of Sequence - Test 8

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:select1' by value К.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Get Element Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the value of ``attribute`` from the element ``locator``.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.doc: Returns the value of ``attribute`` from the element ``locator``.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Element Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the value of ``attribute`` from the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Проверка поля ввода последовательности (Цвет символа соотвествует названию буквы К-красный, З-зеленый, С-синий)

test.name: Check Sort Button Options - Test 9

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:select1' by value С.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Known issue: result may be incorrect due to Bug #5430
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

test.doc: Проверка кнопки "Сортировать" : имя кнопки корректно и при ее нажатии прописывается результат
test.status:
!= С К
Also teardown failed: Known issue: Bug #5430

test.name: Check Result Options - Test 10

kw.doc: Returns the value of ``attribute`` from the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Проверка поля вывода результата (поле вывода пустое и недоступно для редактирования)

test.doc: Проверка кнопки "Очистить" (имя кнопки корректно и при ее нажатии выпадающие списки принимаю дефолтное значение, а поля становятся пустыми)

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:select1' by value К.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:select2' by value З.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:select3' by value С.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${text_result} = К К К К К З З З З З С С
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.msg: ${cleaned_result} = К К К К К З З З З З С С

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: К К К К К З З З З З С С
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.arg: К К К К К З З З З З С С
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.name: Check Hight Loaded Sorting - Test 14

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:select1' by value З.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:select2' by value К.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:select3' by value С.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${text_result} = З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С ...
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.msg: ${cleaned_result} = З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С ...

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.arg: З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З З К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К К С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С С
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: Проверка правильности сортировки при большой нагрузке
